overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay showing an Arasaka armored truck driving through a foggy, industrial highway interchange at night. The vehicle navigates through curved tunnels, past container storage yards, and under massive concrete overpasses with atmospheric artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved concrete tunnel with high retaining walls

agents.ego_description: navigating an Arasaka armored truck through a curved underground tunnel with smooth concrete walls

entered.detail: smooth concrete retaining wall with horizontal construction lines and yellow light reflections
curved concrete wall following the road bend with wet surface reflections
wet asphalt surface with double yellow lane markings
suspended industrial floodlights illuminating the foggy tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The segment shows an Arasaka armored truck driving through a narrow, curved concrete tunnel. The walls are smooth industrial concrete with overhead lights cutting through the fog, creating a moody, enclosed atmosphere with wet road reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway storage yard with stacked cargo containers

events.description: exits curved tunnel into open storage area with green cargo containers visible on the left

agents.ego_description: driving straight through a container storage zone with green barriers stacked along the left roadside

entered.detail: stacked green cargo containers behind security fencing
metal security fence running parallel to the highway
elevated concrete highway ramp visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into a more open highway storage area. Green shipping containers line the left side behind chain-link fencing, while overhead lights illuminate the foggy atmosphere. The scene transitions from enclosed tunnel to open industrial highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway underpass beneath industrial building

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath massive concrete industrial structure with glass facade

agents.ego_description: driving under a massive concrete overpass with industrial buildings visible through glass windows on the left side

entered.detail: thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
large industrial building with illuminated glass windows showing interior structures
underside of the highway overpass with exposed beams and lighting fixtures
red warning lights visible in the distance through the fog

segments.scene_description: The truck drives beneath a massive concrete overpass structure, entering a covered highway section. On the left, an industrial building with large glass facades reveals interior lighting, while thick concrete pillars line the road. Red signal lights glow in the foggy distance as the vehicle continues through the industrial complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking an Arasaka armored truck as it transitions from a claustrophobic tunnel into a sprawling, foggy industrial complex. It begins within a narrow, curved concrete tunnel where overhead lights cut through the mist and reflect off the wet road surface. As the vehicle emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a highway storage area lined with green shipping containers and chain-link fencing under a hazy glow. The camera then follows the truck beneath a massive concrete overpass, shifting from the open air into a covered section flanked by thick pillars and a glass-fronted industrial building. Finally, the view extends toward the foggy distance where red signal lights glow as the vehicle pushes deeper into the industrial landscape.
